textByHashes.3777a17131553434a632fc2810a5af56f6321db4: Don't talk to me outerlander! I don't have time for the likes of you!
textByHashes.9e8140b51a3772aecc5d4fb5cbbab8df7040b171: Can't say I've heard of you. So they let your sort into the clan nowadays? Wow. Things have really changed since I've been gone...
textByHashes.5211bf771b1a27f80da16620b2d1a474fdc7fc1e: Yes, I suppose that's true... I have been gone such a long time...
textByHashes.6f0cfdeab6f624f6295d8423928887cd9236b788: Oh, you haven't heard of the infamous Lokar, scourge of the northern seas?
textByHashes.b8ec81024b6c276971ba3fcf0ae7a5692e10773c: Forgotten already? Tch! I have no regrets about why I left!
textByHashes.2ba990e657337b9e180b0adf99c33d00e7c41e69: As a young man, I learnt that the Fremennik way of life was too slow for me...
textByHashes.d0029fc4a2b672d63de37006db11c9d59ce97a3d: Oh, sure, every so often we got to go on big raiding parties, looting and pillaging the weaker islands around here for food and profit, but...
textByHashes.f81d12e97e6e11bb80d5fc90b30c2883e696a887: Well, after a while, that was all I looked forward to doing.
textByHashes.a672a6c8f56d77ceb0ad050cc2a7d0538a47be40: Growing crops, milking cows, catching and cooking food, the day to day activities of our life...
textByHashes.747863c3e5f91d088298fbabb1bf95b911be3ff9: No, I knew what I wanted to do, and that was attack innocent people going about their daily business, steal all their money, then spend it on wine, women and song!
textByHashes.faf739e9c54486dee9d9b0a0f36d8025d4dd3a7a: So I ran away from Rellekka to become a PIRATE! It's way more fun. Plus you get to see the world!
textByHashes.5611fc7f777a5a71d34f5253fc47e24e1d48ac99: Yes, I have returned here, but that's only because we're short on supplies.
textByHashes.c9067f00e1660c19c93ced3530c058d7f520d652: Indeed. Well, the rest of the group are at Lunar Isle at the moment. It's where the Moon Clan live.
textByHashes.94c393db268ce3a3e5c31d50fad6e61c117f9dad: I'd be surprised if you hadn't, they're the Fremenniks' most hated enemy!
textByHashes.e97a51a86a2918d60ba969665ca5fa3ea34bf2f3: They've been at war with them for hundreds of years!
textByHashes.76f6c6f9bb622bb4204c23334b715579c4b34e80: Hmmm. Actually, that might be a problem for you then.
textByHashes.b9c42a868f953f9ff9f3f7a7e70ab1c387943f22: Yeah, they're a really powerful race of mages. They'd read your mind and see that you're a Fremennik straight away, then probably turn you inside out and feed you to the birds.
textByHashes.161ae58c241bf83d7a8035d570e6a348f48a9292: Yeah, but I think the Fremenniks are a bunch of losers. They probably picked up on that.
textByHashes.2c2a4632ca82f7c7dd9ad4920a2b5c1929e98e35: Look, I know a way you'll be able to travel there without, you know, getting killed and that, if you fancy a trip!
textByHashes.b9ab61f97aacc59b34ef0d97db8c95bcfe3243ba: Well, what you want to do is go and talk to Brundt the Chieftain and get a Seal of Passage from him.
textByHashes.6d21d136ae33fc545af54c56409fdf80a21eb569: Well, it shows that you're a diplomat for the Fremennik, so you'll have immunity from being killed and stuff.
textByHashes.90240361c5f8b7217e4d587a3b6816e40951ae43: It's an ancient tradition not to attack anyone bearing a Seal of Passage, because they're probably on a diplomatic mission. Or well connected with powerful allies. Either way, killing them is usually a bad idea.
textByHashes.b3c537d10552933767ff495d7f3ba1af9243cae7: What? I never said you had to bother trying to do that, you just have to pretend like you might.
textByHashes.cc7bd7cd861a035e1172e847ffa7f19b5a2f1261: No skin off my nose if those losers want to get slaughtered by the Moon Clan, just more stuff for me to loot when they're all dead.
textByHashes.89b4aaa6edfa5be24fcb0287ddacdac01fc6335e: Yeah, just go over and talk to the chief loser. You might have to tell him some rubbish he wants to hear, but that's it.
textByHashes.ae3ae8bcbde2c0598f430754779655fcf7e89c43: Come back here when you got it, my supplies are loaded and I'm good to head back to our ship.
textByHashes.1e3629b973b78f23dead38c4d937177b9d89d53f: Oh, so you're a loser like the rest of the Fremenniks then? See ya around, loser.
textByHashes.3cde8719a234f0fdf6eac1429790426c8bf909cb: Hey there . So you get that seal thingy off of the Brundt the Chieftain yet?
textByHashes.47b50dfb9ceffcbf340ccb66a021884070888e2c: Well hurry it up, okay? I'm sick of this dump of a town, I want to go back to the ship!
textByHashes.81db6d192d329f006ae02ba5b202d8aa62f04764: So you got that seal yet from Brundt the Chieftain? Can I leave this dump of a town?
textByHashes.9c18fdd435ef36a2cbc4994427625611383581ee: What are you? Useless? Go get another one from Brundt the Chieftain, and hurry it up, I don't want to be here any longer than I have to be!
textByHashes.35dbac376c2400a763d9df2569f5aa24b64535a3: Great! Then let's head back to my ship! You ready to go now?
textByHashes.5998925d6d8f37ce10d2bacc87fc00655734ca2e: I suggest you DON'T talk like that to my crew. They will probably assume you are mocking them and kill you.
textByHashes.1423c5e6983d8ed504b806a7b8427379938b067e: So let's start again: Are you ready to go?
textByHashes.55cfe187910b61b6737d68b2611fc636b1e3e1db: I suppose that will have to do.
textByHashes.36392ad8dcfd09a2c07c7fe4475848014bf59a17: Here we are at the Pirates' Cove! You'll find the captain already on board.
textByHashes.038058efac7890aa07c3f78fdc102ca5433c2140: Well hurry it up okay? This place is a dump, and I'm a vicious blood-thirsty pirate, not your personal travel agent.
textByHashes.1cc469cc3bbd03306a28a275f4138024a94a4151: Hi again ! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.b0c8befe8be27d05b74f055f2b9a264785683d4c: Silly you. You'll have to go back to Brundt the Chieftain to get another before you can go on to Lunar Isle.
textByHashes.1b4d5b442c4134ded4576112bedb6b07d306f3e8: Hey, if you want to go back to loserville with all the losers, who am I to stop you?
textByHashes.52966da53bd95dd4e6806db63ce65e0b7bc4eb23: Hey, I knew you seemed cool when I met you !
textByHashes.721f720676c06f2f7bb2671b60538d4a744753ad: You won't make many friends on Lunar Isle without your Seal of Passage.
textByHashes.9e6bac4aca7badc11fa48e7af81dedf2f3e677d5: Sheesh, make your mind pal, I'm not a taxi service!
textByHashes.f77e88fe9d598a48a43b51c39c320076ddcff422: You are possibly the most indecisive person I have ever met...
textByHashes.5f13b964579af1ef235958edc0db37a121319fdd: Don't talk to me! I don't have time for the likes of you!
textByHashes.56eb912e2f52e05679eba1cefc3d8e88d079312c: Sheesh, make your mind up pal, I'm not a taxi service!
textByHashes.6153dac8550033a94b8f9a6e46af38b0b51ba8d5: Sheesh, make your mind up lady, I'm not a taxi service!
